# IBDPal (ibdpal.org)

> IBDPal is an iOS health app and educational website for people with inflammatory bowel disease (IBD), including Crohn’s disease and ulcerative colitis. Content is for education only and does not replace care from a clinician.

## Site
- Homepage: https://ibdpal.org/
- IBD Crohn's support: https://ibdpal.org/ibd-crohns-support
- Newly diagnosed: https://ibdpal.org/newly-diagnosed
- Visit prep checklist: https://ibdpal.org/visit-prep
- Resource library: https://ibdpal.org/resources
- Community map: https://ibdpal.org/#community
- Pediatric & caregivers: https://ibdpal.org/pediatric-caregivers
- Patient stories: https://ibdpal.org/patient-stories
- For clinicians: https://ibdpal.org/for-clinicians
- Clinical partnerships: https://ibdpal.org/clinical-partnerships
- Spanish: https://ibdpal.org/es/recursos
- Privacy: https://ibdpal.org/privacy
- App support: https://ibdpal.org/support

- https://ibdpal.org/blog/travel-with-ibd

- https://ibdpal.org/blog/best-foods-crohns-flare
- https://ibdpal.org/blog/foods-that-may-trigger-uc-symptoms
- https://ibdpal.org/blog/how-nutrition-impacts-gut-health-ibd
- https://ibdpal.org/blog/hydration-tips-ibd
- https://ibdpal.org/blog/tracking-food-symptoms-ibdpal
- https://ibdpal.org/blog/introducing-ibdpal

## Organization
- MediVue (501(c)(3) nonprofit, North Carolina) develops IBDPal.
- General inquiries: info@ibdpal.org
- Support: support@ibdpal.org

## Machine-readable index
- Sitemap: https://ibdpal.org/sitemap.xml
